offer: For accounting firms managing 10–50 clients, inadequate risk identification causes client financial losses. We automate risk management instead of manual risk assessments and client consultations.
problem: Inability to proactively identify and mitigate financial risks for clients.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where firms share tools
try_it: Let users try risk identification tools on 1-3 clients
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
